There are a couple issues 

1\. When first going on the platform the default should be on the light mode (white screen version not dark) 

2\. No user of any kind or mentor can get to the dashboard unless they have logged in (this includes the submit feedback button.   
2a. Additionally I need to be able to change the wording, and numbers on the website page and on the portal pages. I need this to be dynamic as previously explained. This includes wording of any kind, adding logos for the logo belt, adding feedback from the “Results from Our Community” part, also the “All Programs \+ Professional Tracks” section  and the graphs and anything else that has words on it, on the platform.

3\. When seeing the Sign up pop up it needs to look like this (you changed this, before it was good):   
![][image1]

4\. Only Undergrads and Grads have to include a .edu email. Professionals can use what they want. 

5\. The verification part is not good. They need to be sent an 6 digit code to the email that they entered. It needs to look more like this for the email:  
 ![][image2]

5a. And for the verification part:   
![][image3]

6\. I need to be able to access the admin dashboard \- this has to be a link that is secret and i need to have a user that set up. Needs to have a reset password workflow as well and to that point \- the reset password workflow is not set up on the website nor admin dashboard. I was clear about this before. 

7\. When I try to highlight over text in the pop ups \- login and signup \- the pop ups close \- that should not be the case

8\. This image in the portal:   
![][image4]  
Needs to look like this (the same on the website):   
![][image5]

9\. "Why Us" section the \- Learn more about our approach button is not set up and is completely missing (I get an error code)

10\. "Your Dream University Is Waiting" section has a broken link \- the "how it works" does not take you to that section but it shows an error code

11\. A bunch of the footers do not work and show broken pages (404 error pages) \- Here is a list: 

* Home   
* Our Services   
* Meeting Types  
* Sign up   
* Log in  
* Contact Us  
* Privacy Policy   
* Terms of Service

Also on the menu bar the home button does not work, I get a 404 error, and the same when you press on the grads paths logo in the top left

12\. This needs to be the universal UI and view for all of mentor cards, (there are a couple variations but this is what it needs to be. Also “services offered”, needs to be open automatically, but it has the option to close if the user chooses.    
![][image6] 

13\. "Explore by University" section, there are a couple of fixes needed \- only the top 6 most used colleges will be visible (without pressing on the "view all institutions button"). Also the college names need to be the full name but that is an admin dashboard correction. Also there needs to be a logo where the names are so it looks like this for example:   
![][image7]

13\. Also I need like **14** I need to have the option to display the institutions I want, and this needs to update on a daily basis automatically this is based on how many meetings there have been with mentors at the specific college/institution. \- that is the default setting

14\. "Mentors of the Week" \- must be the top rated 6 mentors or the mentors i choose specifically (this will be updated automatically every week, based on rating of the mentor) this is automatic but as i said i do have the option to input someone and swap in another person, if i choose to.

15\. I need to be able to add in the admin dashboard the specifics for the tab (accessed on the left panel) “Institutions” / "Explore by University" section and I add specifically in the "Program Tier" and "Program Type" \- also all of the institution tabs must have a logo added (visual example below):   
![][image8]

16\. When I have access, I will make the fixes toward the names of the colleges, Available program categories… When you press on a specific college it looks good for the programs and pressing mentors view, the only thing is, refer to the **12**, the mentor does need to have the same view

Also \- this button is a little too dark ![][image9]  
It is in the the **16** part where you press on a college and  can see the programs and mentors offered. Make it look like this color scheme so it is more easily visible:  
![][image10]

17\. For colleges that have multiple programs in different program tiers then there will be this view:   
![][image11] listen to **15** but this "Multiple tiers” is for solving the order problems with tiers \- this is important **IT WILL ONLY SAW “MULTIPLE TIERS” WHEN “ALL” IS SELECTED, BUT WHEN A SPECIFIC OPTION IS CHOSEN \- LIKE “TOP 25”, THEN IT WILL SHOW THE CATEGORY THAT IS IN THE TOP 25, IN THIS CAST BOTH LAW AND THERAPY, LIKE THIS IMAGE BELOW:**  
![][image12]

**AND IF THE OPTION IS  REGIONAL THEN IT WILL SHOW THE REGIONAL PROGRAM, IN THIS CASE MBA, LIKE THE IMAGE BELOW:**  
![][image13]

**☆ AND FOR THESE TWO ABOVE, THERE ARE ONLY FOUR \[OPTIONS TO BE CLEAR\]: ☆**

1. **ALL \- ALL COLLEGES/INSTITUTIONS WILL BE HERE**  
2. **ELITE PROGRAMS \- I WILL CHOOSE THESE ON THE ADMIN DASHBOARD**  
3. **TOP 25 PROGRAMS \- I WILL CHOOSE THESE ON THE ADMIN DASHBOARD**  
4. **REGIONAL PROGRAMS \- I WILL CHOOSE THESE ON THE ADMIN DASHBOARD**

18\. “Find Mentors” tab/section looks great \- the only thing is refer to **12**, the UIs need to look the same a **12** and the “Services offered” needs to be automatically opened

19\. The back arrows do not work when in “Book with Mentor” sections, and the “type of session” arrow on the left is unnecessary, so delete it please

19a. “Recent Feedback” is an automatic and really important part of mentors notes, these need to come from the last filled out form from a user, and it needs to come from “Quick Feedback” section in the form \- it will update a lot but that is how it needs to be 

20\. Everything looks great in the "Office Hours This Week" section \- just test that users will be able to actually chose the type of meeting, in advance if they are the only one. Also make sure that the mentors will get paid from what I explained:   
The person will pay for the credits ahead of time \- all of that goes to the platform/business stripe account \- from there when a user pays for a credit. → 1 person \= $15 to the mentor (this comes from the platform/business stripe account and I will not need to make these transactions manually; this is a part of the process. 

- Also \- all mentors will be on this page, \- some of the mentors will only have one or two of the services that they can do, for example: a mentor named **Kim Cho** is only available to do “program insights” service they cannot do “tutoring”, or “interview prep”. This means they will only ever have to do “Program insights” and there will be no rotation for **Kim Cho** because she is simply unable to do any other service that we offer for multiple people. 

**☆ For Office Hours of the Week \- We only offer three types of meetings: ☆**

1. **Tutoring**  
2. **Program Insights**   
3. **Interview Prep**

**And also the order of people will be based on the highest rating score. Top have the highest, bottom have the lowest**

**Note for the admin dashboard, I will be able to change peoples ratings as an admin override.** 

21\. This tab you changed a lot. **USERS CANNOT SEE THIS, NOT EVEN THE USER THAT HAD THE MEETING WITH THE MENTOR \- THIS IS ONLY FOR MENTORS (THIS IS FROM THE STUDENT PORTAL PERSPCETIVE SO THEY SHOULD EVEN HAVE THIS OPTION ON THERE LEFT TAB \-** “Mentor Notes” → change to “Mentor Notes on Users” for the title. Most recent forms will be at the top as is, real time updates. **Read more option** that is purple and centered for each person is needed. The Feedback tab should be before this, and this is the correct order of the tabs:  
 ![][image14]

Also these need to be the search bars for this tab:  
![][image15]

This image is how it should look: it may be a little misleading. The user is Emma Rodriguez, the mentors names are also Emma Rodr… but in reality where the view buttons are will be different mentors like: **john honda** for the first form and for the second **piper brue** or something like that.   
![][image16]

22\. Feedback \- these are live updating stats and “across 10 complete sessions” will need to be constantly updated as meetings get created  
![][image17]

23\. “Your Session Is Booked" section looks good one change \- the current top right says “contact support in the red button, I need it to say and look like this image:  
![][image18]![][image19]  
With that extra “Cancel this meeting” option, (also add an x to the tip right of the second image so people can get out (and yes I know this is redundant)) and then comes this image:   
![][image20]

**REALLY IMPORTANT BELOW:**  
I will say. Refunds should be automatic \- as long as it is (i think we said 12 hours before the meeting) \- that said i should get notifications and see them on my admin dashboard (and you cannot get full refunds buying the 5 credits for $200 \- you can refund the credits (one by one) but in order to refund the $200 dollars for the 5 credits, you must have 5 credits that can be taken away from a users account. 

23a.   
“Feedback After Your Meeting” this in the bookings session is locked until after the meeting is over. At that point a user will have 24 hours to fill out the quick 1 minute form (that will be automatically attached to that mentor) \- If the 24 hours run out then the user cannot access anything until the form has been completed (make sure the user can’t get around this but is able to complete the form/s). This is the same rules for the **Mentors (but the mentors get a different form, and the form goes to a different place” \- BE REALLY CAREFUL TO MAKE SURE THIS WORKS PERFECTLY**

**Also another thing this platform needs to handle are multiple chats (if you have multiple meetings coming up with different mentors, or the same mentor but service specific questions.) Anyways you get the point \- the forms need to be specifically tied to the correct mentor and so do the chats** 

- **Also there need to be notifications for the users and mentors, through emails of activity aka chats, and in the portal near the word bookings on the left tab (there should be the number of notifications there are)** 

**Current meetings section will have meetings that are happening within the next 24 hours and upcoming meetings section will be 25hrs or more in advance**

24\. Support tickets: So this website (not portal) needs to take users and mentors to the Support tab on the portal once they are logged in. (first image or image on the left is on the website, second image or image on the right is the support ticket view on the portal):   
![][image21]![][image22]  
This makes sure users actually make support tickets \- and make sure i actually get these on the admin dashboard (i should get notifications about this too and so should users when i respond)

25\. When you are on a tab in the portal you should have an outline on the left to show you where you are like this:  
 ![][image23]

26\. Users will not have a settings page, this is only for mentors, and the timezone should automatically be set based on where there computer is located at that time (if that is possible) if not then the standard should be **(EST US).** 

- **Users will also not have images of there face (it should just be the first letter of there first and last name (Tyler Cogan \= TC) \- for mentors there face will be there instead of the letters. (this actually has to work \- after testing it hasn’t \- it shows image troubles):** 

**![][image24]**

27\. Now from the perspective of the mentor on the portal. The top bar should be the exact same as the user portal (credits and all and the light and dark change \- as expressed in **8** \- I don’t want to limit business \- if a mentor wants to user the platform and meet with other mentors then I want that to be a possibility. 

**All the changes I said for the user portal will be the same here (unless I explicitly said otherwise \- this includes styles/formats/views…** 

28\. The tabs on the left look great (the ordering is perfect for the mentor portal) 

29\. Your Session Is Booked \- I already made a comment about the cancel meeting thing in **23 and 23a**  
![][image25]

The session notes for mentors are mandatory for mentors as well (same rules as **23a**), and I would also like to say that this should not be in the top right corner. I should look similar to the student portal with live and upcoming meetings
